welcome: Hello! I am your farming assistant. How can I help you today?
chatMicHint: Tap the microphone button to ask your question
disclaimerText: AI-generated content. Please verify locally if required.

questions.text: What is PM-KISAN scheme and how can I apply for it?
Tell me about Kisan Credit Card scheme
I want to know about Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
What are the benefits of Soil Health Card scheme?
Can you explain PMKSY scheme to me?
What government schemes are available for farmers?
I need information about seed authentication scheme
Tell me about the Agriculture Infrastructure Fund
How can I check my soil health card online?
What does my soil test report mean?
Which crops are suitable for my soil based on my Soil Health Card?
Can I get a loan if my previous crop failed and I couldn't repay?
Will defaulting on a loan affect my eligibility for government schemes?
What documents do I need to apply for Kisan Credit Card?
How much insurance coverage will I get for my wheat crop in Punjab?
What is today's mandi price for [crop] in [district]?
What are the latest rates for [crop] in [district] mandi?
What is the current market price of [crop] in [district] mandi?
What is today's weather forecast for [district]?
Will it rain this week in [district]?

capabilities: Answers are based only on standard university documents and crop SOPs.
You can ask about crop practices, pest/disease control, fertilizer schedules, and harvesting methods.
The system can give general agricultural advice but not personalized responses.
limitations: Answers are based on documented best practices—not real-time weather, soil, or market data.
Region-specific and farm-specific recommendations are not available at this time.
Refer to the official SOP documents listed in the app for source references.
feedbackOptions: Response is irrelevant to my question
feedbackDescription: We're sorry that response wasn't helpful. Please let us know what was wrong so we can improve.
feedbackPlaceholder: Or tell us more about the issue...

locationNotSupported.description: Your browser does not support geolocation. Weather-related features will not be available.
